name: docker-agent
description: Docker Agent skill pack for validation-first Go maintenance workflows: auditing, vulnerability triage, major-upgrade planning, and safe dependency bumping.

interface.shortDescription: Docker Agent skills for practical coding workflows in Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Docker Agent skill workflows directly in Codex sessions to audit Go dependency health, triage vulnerabilities, plan major upgrades, and execute safe dependency bumps.
defaultPrompt: Use docker-agent:audit-go-dependencies to produce a prioritized Go maintenance report, then choose triage or bump workflows
Use docker-agent:bump-go-dependencies to update direct Go dependencies safely and summarize results
